general.name: manga_alfalfa
general.short: ALFALFA data for the public MaNGA sample released in SDSS DR15.
general.description: ALFALFA data for the public MaNGA sample released in SDSS DR15. IMPORTANT: This catalog is superseded by the most recent HI-MaNGA catalog which combines GBT and ALFALFA observations (mangaHIall.fits). Any MaNGA galaxy within 2 arcminutes (the beam radius of the final ALFALFA datacubes) and 200 km/s of an ALFALFA HI source is assigned as a match to that source.  For this reason, a single ALFALFA detection can have multiple optical counterparts. Objects in the ALFALFA footprint that lack detections have their HI upper limits estimated using the noise level extracted from their location in the ALFALFA data cubes. For convenience, we use the same column names as the mangaHIall.fits file where possible.  We also provide additional information about the crossmatched sources for the user.

surveys.name: MaNGA
surveys.long: Mapping Nearby Galaxies at Apache Point Observatory
surveys.description: A wide-field optical spectroscopic IFU survey of extragalactic sources to study galaxy dynamics and kinematics

general.naming_convention: manga_alfalfa-dr[dr].fitswhere[dr]is the public data release defining the sample for this catalog.
general.generated_by: sas(can be any set of product names)

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

hdu0.description: HDU0 contains no data and no relevant keyword information

header.comment: Dummy primary header created by MWRFITS
No data is associated with this header

hdu1.description: This HDU contains the primary data table for the MaNGA - ALFALFA crossmatch

header.comment: Binary table written by MWRFITS v1.12b

OBJRA.name: OBJRA
OBJRA.description: Right Ascension, J2000 (objra from DRPAll file)

RMS.name: RMS
RMS.description: rms noise in signal free part of HI spectrum

LOGHILIM200KMS.name: LOGHILIM200KMS
LOGHILIM200KMS.description: For non-detections, the log of the HI mass limit (in solar masses) assuming a width of 200 km/s and D = vopt/70 Mpc/km/s

SNR.name: SNR
SNR.description: Signal-to-noise ratio following Equation (4) in Haynes et al. (2018)

FHI.name: FHI
FHI.description: The integrated flux of the HI line

LOGMHI.name: LOGMHI
LOGMHI.description: Log of the HI mass (in solar masses) assuming D = vopt/70 Mpc/km/s

VHI.name: VHI
VHI.description: Velocity centroid of the HI line detection

WP20.name: WP20
WP20.description: Width of the HI line measured at 20% of the peak on fits to the sides of the profile

WF50.name: WF50
WF50.description: Width of the HI line measured at 50% of the peak on fits to the sides of the profile

SEP.name: SEP
SEP.description: Angular separation between the HI source and the optical position of the MaNGA galaxy

DV.name: DV
DV.description: Difference between the recession velocity of the HI source and the MaNGA galaxy measured using optical spectra

AGC.name: AGC
AGC.description: ALFALFA AGC number for this HI source
